title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map got a refresh
gist.blurb: The API reference has been regenerated from the live OpenAPI spec. One small page change, one less chance of navigating by folklore.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the production OpenAPI specification so the published API reference matches the current deployment.
gist.impact: Developers reading APIDOCS.md get documentation aligned with the API currently running in production.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy documentation refresh: Polli, wearing tiny librarian glasses, updates a glowing API manual beside a retro terminal while small code-plants and flowers grow around it. The visual symbol is a freshly stamped reference book synced to a gentle production server glow.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink cheek blush and light blue wings, wearing tiny librarian glasses and carefully placing a fresh page into a glowing API reference book beside a retro terminal; code-plants and small flowers grow around the desk. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, with small pixel-font text: 'API DOCS SYNC'.
